data.name: Under The Hood
data.detailed_description:
You are starting your first day at a local garage 'Trish's Pit's. Breaking down engines with nothing but your toolbox. But three stunning mechanics are going to distract you at every nut.

Meet Trish the busty hardworking mechanic, Silvie the Kart racing powerhouse and Frankie the computer nerd. These three girls will be your guide to getting a big nut bank.

Under the Hood takes classic arcade action and mixes it with sexy gameplay, steamy dialouge and a slick soundtrack to create a chill fun game!

-Over 30 levels of block busting gameplay!

-New Mechanics keep you on your toes with Springs, Belts and Hazards!

-Explore Silvie, Trish & Frankie before the events of Shady Lewd Kart!

-Over 12 CG Unlocks to get dirty over!

-Easy & Normal mode for casual and hardcore gamers!

-Unlockable Challenge mode (Lost levels with even MORE lewd unlocks!)

-Old school cheats that you can earn to turn the tables!

-Lock N Lewd content for owners of Marble Maid, unlock a whole new route & story!

-Voice work by SilkyMilk & Sarielle with sex scenes!

-Artwork by Pencilanon, Lynte, SkullZLatte & PixelboyMagazin with guest artists TheCon, Applchu and fan artwork!

data.short_description: You are starting your first day at a local garage 'Trish's Pit's. Breaking down engines with nothing but your toolbox. But three stunning mechanics are going to distract you at every nut.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Four core 2GHz+ Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 16 Series
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 120 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
